differential_diagnoses: Disseminated fungal infection (e.g., Candidemia or Cryptococcosis)
next_steps: Immediate ophthalmology consultation for surgical intervention (vitrectomy) and intravitreal antibiotic/antifungal therapy
Percutaneous image-guided drainage of the large hepatic abscess for Gram stain, culture, and sensitivity
Screening for undiagnosed diabetes mellitus (HbA1c and point-of-care glucose)
Send blood, sputum, and abscess aspirate for broad-range PCR (e.g., 16S rRNA) and specific cultures (bacterial, mycobacterial, and fungal)
HIV serology to assess for underlying immunocompromise
Continue broad-spectrum parenteral antibiotics while awaiting culture results, potentially adding coverage for melioidosis if suspected based on geography or microbiology
